name: Bayview Acquisition Corp
business: Bayview Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has generated no revenues to date and does not expect to generate operating revenues until consummation of a business combination. It intends to primarily focus on businesses in Asia.

exposures.sentence: Our efforts in identifying prospective target businesses will not be limited to a particular geographic region, although we intend to primarily focus on businesses in Asia.
Since we may initiate a business combination with target company operating in China, you may be subject to additional risk factors.

catalysts.sentence: On February 23, 2026, the Company appealed Nasdaq's determination to delist the Company by requesting a hearing with the Nasdaq hearings panel, which hearing is scheduled for March 31, 2026, at 11:00 am Eastern Standard Time.
